recipes.title: VA Form 9 appeal workflow
recipes.description: Curates the static-text extraction fields from VA Form 9 into a builder-native appeal workflow.

anyText: \b(?:va[-_\s]?9|appeal to board|statement of the case|issues to appeal)\b

component.hint: Enter the Veteran name exactly as it appears on the appeal paperwork.
Enter the VA claim file number if one is listed.
Enter an insurance file number or loan number if one applies.
Select your relationship to the Veteran.
Enter a phone number where VA can reach you at home.
Enter a work phone number if one applies.
Enter your mailing address.
Complete this only if the person making the appeal is not the Veteran.
Choose whether the appeal covers selected issues or every issue from the statement of the case.
List each issue you want the Board to review.
Explain why you believe VA decided the case incorrectly.
Use this continuation area for additional explanation from item 9.
Select the Board hearing option requested for this appeal.
The person making the appeal signs here.
Enter the date the appeal was signed.
An appointed representative signs here, if applicable.
Enter the date the representative signed.

recipes.title: VA Form 21-0958 Notice of Disagreement workflow
recipes.description: Curates the static-text extraction fields from VA Form 21-0958 into a builder-native Board appeal notice of disagreement workflow.

anyText: \b(?:21[-_\s]?0958|notice of disagreement|board review option)\b

component.label: Veteran's full name
component.hint: Enter the Veteran's first, middle, and last name.

component.label: Veteran's Social Security number
component.hint: Enter the Social Security number without dashes.

component.label: Veteran's VA file number
component.hint: Enter the VA file number if it is different from the Social Security number.

component.label: Claimant's full name
component.hint: Complete this only if the person filing the appeal is not the Veteran.

component.label: Claimant's date of birth
component.hint: Complete this only if the person filing the appeal is not the Veteran.

component.label: Preferred mailing address
component.hint: Enter the mailing address VA should use for this appeal.

component.label: Preferred phone number
component.hint: Enter the phone number VA should use for this appeal.

component.label: Preferred email address
component.hint: Enter the email address VA should use for this appeal.

component.label: Representative's name
component.hint: Enter the appointed representative's name, if applicable.

component.label: Board review option
component.hint: Select how the Board should review this appeal.

responseOptions.label: Direct review by a Veterans Law Judge
Evidence submission reviewed by a Veterans Law Judge
Hearing with a Veterans Law Judge

component.label: Issues I want to appeal
component.hint: List each issue decided by VA that you want the Board to review.

component.label: Signature
component.hint: The appellant or appointed representative signs here.

recipes.title: Standard Form 180 military records request workflow
recipes.description: Curates the static-text extraction fields from Standard Form 180 into a builder-native military records request workflow.

anyText: \b(?:standard[-_\s]+form[-_\s]+180|sf[-_\s]?180|request pertaining to military records)\b

component.label: Name used during service
component.hint: Enter the last, first, and full middle name used during military service.

component.label: Social Security number
component.hint: Enter the Social Security number without dashes.

component.label: Service, past and present
component.hint: List all known service periods to support an effective records search.

component.label: Did this person retire from military service?
Records being requested
component.hint: Select or describe each record item requested from the source form.

component.label: Purpose of request
component.hint: Explain the purpose of the records request if provided.

component.label: Requester relationship to service member
component.hint: Describe the requester's relationship to the service member or Veteran.

component.label: Authorization signature
component.hint: The requester signs here to authorize the records request.

recipes.title: VA Form 95 tort claim workflow
recipes.description: Curates the static-text extraction fields from VA Form 95 into a builder-native tort claim workflow.

anyText: \b(?:va[-_\s]?form[-_\s]?95|tort[-_\s]?claim|basis of claim)\b

component.label: Federal agency receiving this claim
component.hint: Enter the federal agency where this claim will be submitted.

component.label: Claimant or representative name and address
component.hint: Enter the claimant's name and address, and the personal representative if one is listed.

component.label: Time of accident
component.hint: Enter the time of the accident and indicate A.M. or P.M.

component.label: Basis of claim
component.hint: Describe the facts and circumstances of the damage, injury, or death.

component.label: Personal injury or wrongful death amount
Witnesses
component.hint: List witnesses to the incident, if any.

component.label: Accident insurance details
component.hint: State whether accident insurance applies. If yes, include company name, address, and policy number.

component.label: Filed a claim with insurance carrier?
component.hint: Indicate whether a claim has been filed and whether it is full coverage or deductible.

component.label: Insurer action on claim
component.hint: Describe what the insurer has taken or proposed to take for this claim.

component.label: Public liability and property damage insurance details
component.hint: State whether public liability and property damage insurance applies. If yes, include the insurance carrier name and address.

recipes.title: VA Form 21-4142 authorization workflow

anyText: \b(?:21[-_\s]?4142|authorization[-_\s]+to[-_\s]+disclose)\b

component.label: Veteran's name
component.hint: Enter the Veteran's first name, middle initial, and last name.

component.label: Social Security number
component.hint: Enter the Veteran's Social Security number without dashes.

component.label: Veteran's service number
component.hint: Enter the service number if applicable.

component.label: Patient's name
component.hint: Enter the patient's first name, middle initial, and last name.

fields.sectionIntro: Add each provider or facility VA may request records from.

component.label: Provider or facility name
component.hint: Enter the provider or facility name.

fields.sectionIntro: Add each provider or facility VA may request records from.

component.label: Dates of treatment
component.hint: Enter the dates or date range of treatment.

fields.sectionIntro: Add each provider or facility VA may request records from.

component.label: Provider or facility street address
component.hint: Enter the provider or facility street address.

recipes.title: VA Form 3288 records release workflow
recipes.description: Curates the AcroForm extraction fields from VA Form 3288 (Request for and Consent to Release of Information from Claimant's Records) into a builder-native records release workflow.

anyText: \b(?:va[-_\s]?form[-_\s]?3288|consent to release of information|claimant'?s records|release of information from claimant)\b

component.label: VA office address
component.hint: Enter the name and address of the VA office that will receive this request.

component.label: Veteran name
component.hint: Enter the Veteran's last name, first name, and middle initial.

component.label: Claimant name (if different from Veteran)
component.hint: Leave blank if the claimant is the Veteran.

component.label: Social Security number
component.hint: Enter the 9-digit Social Security number with no dashes.

component.label: Recipient name and address
component.hint: Enter the name and address of the organization or individual that will receive the released information.

component.label: Name of person consenting to release
component.hint: Enter the full name of the person authorizing this release.

component.label: Information to be released
component.hint: Describe the records, dates, or specific information VA may release.

component.label: Purpose of release
component.hint: Describe the purpose for which the information will be used.

component.label: Signature of individual or authorized representative
component.hint: Type the full legal name of the person signing this consent.

component.label: Respondent burden notice
component.hint: Standard VA respondent burden statement printed on the form.

recipes.title: VA Form 21-8940 TDIU workflow

component.label: Social Security number
component.hint: Enter the 9-digit Social Security number with no dashes.

component.label: Service-connected disability preventing employment
component.hint: Describe the service-connected disabilities that prevent you from securing or following substantially gainful employment.

component.label: Have you been under a doctor's care for this disability?
Date became too disabled to work
Most ever earned in one year
component.hint: Enter the dollar amount.

component.label: Employment for the last five years
component.hint: List all employment, including self-employment, for the last five years you worked.

component.label: Did you leave your last job or self-employment because of your disability?
Do you receive or expect disability or workers' compensation benefits?
Have you tried to obtain employment since you became too disabled to work?

component.label: Other education or training before becoming too disabled to work?
Education or training since becoming too disabled to work?

component.hint: Add any remarks or additional information.

component.label: Signature of claimant
component.hint: Type the claimant's full legal name.

component.label: Signature of witness
component.hint: Type the witness's full legal name if a witness is present.
